mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment_storage (storage_id, equipment_id, storage_location, status, linked_moveout_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{storageId}, #{equipmentId}, #{storageLocation}, #{status}, #{linkedMoveoutId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT s.storage_id, e.name AS equipment_name, s.storage_location, s.status FROM equipment_storage s JOIN equipment e ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id AND e.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
